specs.title: cp-000: Plagiarism limit is derived from plan as 3 for free 10 for basic and 50 for pro
cp-001: Preferences tab renders a local Theme section label above the page-level ThemeTo
cp-002: Before client mount ThemeToggle renders a placeholder pill instead of real butto
cp-003: Theme toggle contains exactly two buttons Daylight and Night
cp-004: Clicking Daylight calls setThemelight
cp-005: Clicking Night calls setThemedark
cp-006: When Daylight is active the Daylight button uses bg-surface text-ink shadow-sm
cp-007: When Night is active the Night button uses bg-surface text-ink shadow-sm
cp-008: Inactive theme buttons use text-ink-muted styling
cp-009: Active theme icons switch to weightfill and inactive icons use weightregular
cp-010: Clicking Daylight sets the html class list to the light theme state and stores t
cp-011: Clicking Night sets the html class list to the dark theme state and stores theme
cp-012: Theme changes apply immediately and do not require clicking Save Preferences
cp-013: Theme choice persists after a page refresh through next-themes storage
cp-014: Editor Font Size label is rendered above the first preferences select
cp-015: Editor Font Size select options are exactly 14px 16px Default 18px and 20px
cp-016: Editor Font Size select defaults to 16
cp-017: Changing Editor Font Size updates only the local fontSize state in this page com
cp-018: Editor Font Size is not included in the handleSavePreferences payload
cp-019: Default Citation Format select initializes from userdefault_citation_style or fa
cp-020: Citation Format options are APA 7th Edition MLA 9th Edition Chicago 17th and Van
cp-021: Preferred Language select initializes from userpreferred_language or falls back
cp-022: Preferred Language options are English Hindi Spanish French German Portuguese Ch
cp-023: Save Preferences is enabled on initial render even when no select value has chan
cp-024: Save Preferences is disabled only while savingPrefs is true
cp-025: While saving preferences the button label changes from Save Preferences to Savin
cp-026: Preferences save uses text-only loading feedback with no spinner icon
cp-027: Successful preferences saves render the inline message Preferences saved success
cp-028: Failed preferences saves render the inline message Failed to save preferences Pl
cp-029: Preferences successerror feedback auto-clears after 3 seconds through showSaveMe
cp-030: Preferences save payload includes only preferred_language and default_citation_s
cp-031: Successful preferences saves update the local user state for preferred_language
cp-032: Saved citation-format and language values persist after a page refresh
cp-033: Log Out button has NO onClick handler clicking it performs no action in the curr
cp-034: Log Out button hover state shows bg-red-50010 translucent red background
